title: Taiyuan, Shanxi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Taiyuan, Shanxi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Taiyuan is a city in Shanxi with a population of 5,305,000. Capital of Shanxi province, a historic coal-mining center with ancient temples, pagodas, and a transitioning economy.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
